creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text: This isn't correct. The specific dependency versions that upstream specified are that way for a reason: gast 0.5 and 0.6 are not compatible with each other, and using the wrong version will result in runtime errors. The correct action is to revert devel/py-gast back to 0.5, unless pythran is updated to/past the commit bumping the gast dependency.
